title: EECOM Console Log — The Two-Minute Gap
description: The Mission Control telemetry log for the first four minutes after the explosion, printed from the EECOM station. The anomaly is flagged at 21:07:53. Liebergot's first recommendation — 'stand by, possible sensor failure' — is logged at 21:08:11. The order to begin emergency procedures is logged at 21:10:04. The gap between the anomaly flag and the emergency order is one minute and fifty-three seconds. A handwritten note in the margin reads: 'Apollo 12 sensor glitch — similar signature — SL.' The initials are Liebergot's.
